conjecture: If B=⊕_r B_r (order-unit norm = max_r) and each factor has an exact-adjoint coboundary splitting with constant K_r, then B has one with constant max_r K_r + 1, independent of the number of summands (off-block components recovered by P_r f(e_r,·), with no sum over r); valid for adjoint/block-respecting modules.
author: prover-direct-sum
